narrative.when: 晚上十一点，准备睡觉前刷一下手机
narrative.who: 甲（用户）· 乙（朋友，评论区互动）
narrative.how: 打开应用，浏览动态后发帖或评论
narrative.method: 打开应用看动态、发一张照片、回复朋友的评论、关掉应用
narrative.event: 甲今天去了一个好地方，想发照片分享给朋友

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have a look at the news.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, do that before sleep.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That cat picture is quite good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I saw it. A little thing, quite pleasing.
turns.zh: 嗯，我看到了。小东西挺逗的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like to put up a picture.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: From your walk today?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the field of flowers.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get it from the store.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The light is soft and good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put it up then. I will keep an eye.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, it is up now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. The colors are soft.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the sun was not too bright.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A good place for a quiet day.
turns.zh: 是个适合安静待着的好地方。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will go to sleep now. rest up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Where are we?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A secret place outside the town.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take me there another time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I will. You will like it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it far from here?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not far, an hour by rail.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I am free on day seven.
turns.zh: 那挺好的。我第七天有空。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. We will go then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am tired now. rest up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. rest up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will send you the place name.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, do that. I will put it in my notes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is a field with flowers, like a picture.
turns.zh: 那是一片花田，像画一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sounds soft. I would like to see it.
turns.zh: 听起来很美。我想去看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We can take food and make a day of it.
turns.zh: 我们可以带吃的，玩一整天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I will make some bread with meat.
turns.zh: 好主意。我做些夹肉面包。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And I will get a bottle of drink.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. What time will we go?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How about ten in the morning?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I will be ready.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. I will send you the place on the net.
turns.zh: 太好了。我把地点发给你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do that. I will keep an eye on my box.
turns.zh: 发吧。我会盯着我的盒子看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have sent it now. Have a look.
turns.zh: 我已经发过去了。你看看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it. It is not far from my house.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, it is a short walk. We will have a good time.
turns.zh: 不远，走几步就到。我们会玩得很开心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put a picture on the net.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What picture?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The field of flowers from today.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that was a good place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put a note with it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What will you say?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Something like 'a happy day'.
turns.zh: 类似“快乐的一天”之类的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good note.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have sent it. Look now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. It got a like from me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, you said something.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Where is this place?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A secret place. I will take you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, is it far from here?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not far. An hour by rail.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. This end of the week?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, if the weather is good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will keep that day free.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will send you the time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am looking forward to it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is it a good idea to take a camera?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. The light will be soft.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get my old one.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have food for the day?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make some bread with meat.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And a bottle of water.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is enough. Simple is best.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take a cloth to rest on.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You see to everything.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We will have a good time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, i will put a picture on the net.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, what picture?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The field of flowers I saw today.
turns.zh: 我今天看到的那片花海。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds good. Let me see.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here it is. What is your idea?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Very good! Where is that place?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A secret place. I will take you one day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will come with you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I am tired now. I will go to sleep.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Same here. rest up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send you the place after a bit.
turns.zh: 我过一会儿把地址发你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not keep it secret too long.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a word. Now I am going to rest.
turns.zh: 说定了。现在我要休息了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, you look tired. rest up.
turns.zh: 嗯，你看起来累了。睡个好觉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. I had a good day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The flowers made it better.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They were soft and bright.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will see them when I am sleeping.
turns.zh: 我会在睡觉时看到它们。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: rest up then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: rest up, friend.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the thing down now.
turns.zh: 我现在要把这东西放下了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, do that. The light is bright.
turns.zh: 嗯，放下吧。屏幕光太亮了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am happy we had this talk.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Me too. Your picture was a good thing.
turns.zh: 我也是。你的照片真不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take you there one day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that. Keep your word.
turns.zh: 那可说好了。你要说话算话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Now rest your eyes.
turns.zh: 一定。现在闭上眼睛休息吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. No more looking at the glass.
turns.zh: 你也是。别再盯着玻璃看了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: rest up. okay in the morning.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: rest up. Have a good rest.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will turn off the light now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will do the same.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No more looking at the bright glass.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are right. It is time to sleep.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us put the talking boxes away.
turns.zh: 我们把通话盒放一边吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I will put mine on the table.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. My eyes are tired.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Mine too. I will rest them now.
turns.zh: 我也是。现在让它们歇歇。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sleep well. See you in the light of day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. Have a good rest.

storyBlurb: 深夜十一点，甲躺在床上刷手机，想分享今天去的好地方。发完照片后，朋友乙的评论让互动变得有趣，最后甲满足地关掉应用准备入睡。
storyScript:
【开场·打开应用】晚上十一点，卧室里只亮着一盏床头灯。甲裹在柔软的被子里，指尖轻触手机屏幕，解锁后自动跳转到社交媒体应用。首页上，朋友们分享着各自的日常：有人晒了晚餐，有人发了工作趣事，还有一段猫咪的视频。甲滑动屏幕，嘴角微微上扬，但心里更想分享自己今天的经历。他点开自己的主页，准备发点什么。

【进行·发帖互动】甲从相册里选了一张照片——那是今天下午在郊外拍的一片花海，阳光透过云层洒在花瓣上，色彩柔和。他想了想，在描述栏里写下：今天发现了一个好地方，心情像这片花一样灿烂。点击发布后，他刷新了一下页面，看到照片已经有了几个点赞。这时，朋友乙的评论弹了出来：哇，这是哪里？下次带我去！甲笑着回复：秘密基地，下次约你。乙很快又回：一言为定！甲看着屏幕，感觉一天的疲惫都消散了。

【收束·下线休息】甲又看了看其他评论，心里暖暖的。他关掉应用，把手机放在床头柜上，屏幕的亮光熄灭，房间重新陷入昏暗。他闭上眼睛，脑海里还浮现着那片花海和朋友的约定。明天醒来，也许会有更多互动，但此刻，他只想好好睡一觉。
